title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Vestian - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Vestian - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Vestian in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vestian:
Vestian is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vestian!
